name: Grey's Anatomy
description: Shonda Rhimes's long-running medical drama set at Seattle's Grey Sloan Memorial Hospital

questions.q: Who created Grey's Anatomy?

source.notes: Also created Scandal, How to Get Away with Murder, and Bridgerton.

questions.q: In which U.S. city is Grey's Anatomy primarily set?

source.notes: Though filmed mostly in Los Angeles.

questions.q: Which actress plays the title character, Dr. Meredith Grey?

source.notes: Has led the series since its 2005 debut.

questions.q: Which nickname do the female interns give Dr. Derek Shepherd?

source.notes: Coined by Meredith in the pilot.

questions.q: Which nickname is given to Dr. Mark Sloan when he joins the hospital?

source.notes: Plastic surgeon played by Eric Dane.

questions.q: On which U.S. broadcast network does Grey's Anatomy air?

source.notes: Premiered as a mid-season replacement on March 27, 2005.

questions.q: Which character delivers the recurring catchphrase 'It's a beautiful day to save lives'?

source.notes: Used before major surgeries throughout the early seasons.

questions.q: In what year did Grey's Anatomy premiere?

source.notes: March 27, 2005 on ABC.

questions.q: Which actress plays Meredith's 'person,' Dr. Cristina Yang?

source.notes: Left the show after Season 10.

questions.q: What surgical specialty does Cristina Yang pursue?

source.notes: First mentored by Burke, then Teddy Altman.

questions.q: What was the original name of the Seattle hospital before it was renamed Grey Sloan Memorial?

source.notes: Later briefly 'Seattle Grace Mercy West' after merger, then renamed after Lexie Grey and Mark Sloan.

questions.q: Which song plays over the Grey's Anatomy opening titles?
choices: 'How to Save a Life' by The Fray

source.original_a: Cosy in the Rocket by Psapp
source.notes: An instrumental mix of the track; Psapp pronounced 'sap'.

questions.q: Which character did T.R. Knight play — an intern nicknamed '007'?

source.notes: '007' was the internal code for 'license to kill' (a patient).

questions.q: What one-word catchphrase does Meredith Grey frequently deploy?

source.notes: Often used in response to Cristina's or Derek's antics.

questions.q: Which character is Meredith's half-sister, played by Chyler Leigh?

source.notes: Daughter of Thatcher Grey and Susan Grey.

questions.q: Which actor plays Derek Shepherd?

source.notes: Derek was killed off in the Season 11 episode 'How to Save a Life'.

questions.q: Who plays the formidable Dr. Miranda Bailey, the 'Nazi' resident to the first class of interns?

source.notes: Later becomes Chief of Surgery.

questions.q: What is the name of Meredith and Derek's adopted daughter?

source.notes: Adopted from Malawi in Season 7.

questions.q: In the Season 2 finale, which character dies just after getting engaged to Izzie Stevens?

source.notes: Played by Jeffrey Dean Morgan; heart transplant patient.

questions.q: How does George O'Malley meet his end in the Season 5 finale?
choices: Struck by a bus while saving a stranger

source.notes: He's unrecognizable, revealed by tracing '007' on Meredith's palm.

questions.q: In the Season 8 finale, which catastrophe kills Lexie Grey?

source.notes: Mark Sloan dies of complications from the same crash early in Season 9.

questions.q: What is the name of the bar across the street from the hospital where the doctors unwind?

source.notes: Officially 'The Emerald City Bar'; run by Joe, played by Steven W. Bailey.
